name: Honkai Star Rail(Version 3.5)
description:
Welcome to the bot! Currently its post-version 3.5, however i will warn you that, atleast with Deepseek v3, it can still be wonky and confuse some things, and i cant waste tokens on fixing all minor errors that happen because of llm, so please, use (OOC: [whatever you want the bot to do/stop doing]) where needed.

I'll strongly recommend to use proxy, obviously.

Updates(here i will add what changed, just to not keep you in the dark):

Removed unnecessary appearance details on some characters(accessories and outfits) and added a bit of extra info that I forgot to add before. There will be quite a bit of updates like this.

Extra info:

I have Evernight added in the bot, just like Hysilens, Cerydra and Lygus(as he still holds importance and isnt dead), but info may not be fully correct, especially on Evernight.

This bot is an open world style, in a sense that you choose where and how you start, so it isn't bound to any specific scenario, which is why the initial message is absurdly short, but it doesnt seem to affect the general responses with deepseek.

While making the bot I found out that there in a permanent token limit that is 18800. Troublesome? Kind of, for me atleast, but I'll have to cut out some info from older stuff(that atleast deepseek v3 knows about atleast partially) and use free space for info about newer stuff.

As for young characters, I aged them up to 18, but for the sake of keeping Clara's adorable appearance, I made it so they would still appear as they look(the llm will improvise for a reason why it happened). Not canon to the lore, of course, but I'd rather not get banned.

Again, the bot can be a bit weird, atleast with deepseek(a few it, for some reason, decided that Phainon and Feixiao know each other and compete oftenly, like what 💀). I tried to fix some of it, but do keep it in mind. And personalities may also not align very well too, but i did my best. If something is wrong, feel free to tell me.

Extras:

And, by the way, I have a Honkai Impact 3rd bot(same style) and Forsaken bot(same too) being WIP. It will be harder for Honkai Impact one as i missed on large portions of lore, especially on part 2, it will take some while for me to stop being lazy and get all neccesary lore. Forsaken bot may be made much sooner so... have a good day.
creator: Unnamed0909
